subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted by the Holy Spirit, Jináb-i-Áqá Siyyid Mihdí, Jináb-i-Áqá Siyyid Ismá'íl and Jináb-i-Áqá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبان روح القدس جناب آقا سید مهدی و جناب آقا سید اسمعیل و جناب آقا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @The Holy Spirit, @Hands of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
